title: [FIRRTL] AsAsyncResetPrimOp type check is too restrictive
body:
The input type required by `AsAsyncResetPrimOp` is too restrictive. The FIRRTL dialect restricts this to `UInt`, `SInt`, or `Clock` types, but the Scala FIRRTL compiler [allows any FIRRTL type](https://github.com/freechipsproject/firrtl/blob/d1c0181e716c37142e233beed2efcea5c5794aa7/src/main/scala/firrtl/passes/CheckTypes.scala#L217).

As one example, the following should not error:

```
circuit Foo :
  module Foo :
    input in : AsyncReset
    output out : AsyncReset

    out <= asAsyncReset(in)
```

Currently, this does:

```bash
firtool AsyncReset.fir 
# AsyncReset.fir:5:12: error: invalid input types for 'asAsyncReset': '!firrtl.asyncreset'
#    out <= asAsyncReset(in)
```
